src: High performance, easy-to-use, and scalable machine learning (ML) package, including linear model (LR), factorization machines (FM), and field-aware factorization machines (FFM) for Python and CLI interface.
ja: 高性能・使いやすい・スケーラブルな機械学習(ML)パッケージ。線形モデル(LR)、Factorization Machines(FM)、Field-aware Factorization Machines(FFM)をPythonおよびCLIインターフェースで提供
